summary: Register governance settings modal page id/sidebar entry and scaffold apps/desktop Playwright CT harness.
acceptance: AC-2: projectSettingsPages has exactly one governance entry with label Permissions & Governance, icon lock, adminOnly true
AC-3: apps/desktop CT harness exists and pnpm test:ct:desktop -- GovernanceSettings mounts GovernanceSettings
AC-4: no governance route directory under apps/desktop/src/routes
expected_checks: pnpm install if node_modules is absent
constraints: Stub GovernanceSettings shell is acceptable only for this task if the real component does not exist yet
